items.name: DiskRaptor
items.description: DiskRaptor is a blazing‑fast disk analyzer built with Rust and Tauri. It scans millions of files using native Win32 APIs, delivers instant tree insights, highlights large folders, supports dark mode, JSON export and cross‑platform builds — the modern open‑source successor to JDiskReport.
